description: Dataset-v2 refresh of tiny multimodal baseline. Same CNN+char-level architecture as v0 but trained on 382 pool examples with 134 answer classes and class-weighted cross-entropy loss.
notes: Same architecture as v0 (3-layer CNN + char-level text encoder + concat fusion). Classification head widens from 24 to 134 classes. Class-weighted CE loss mitigates severe answer imbalance. 40 epochs. Dataset v2 (seed=20260413).
